next_step.current_state: Pre-submit check: Task asks to process inbox request: find specific bill and confirm with bank it is paid. Evidence shows the exact bill exists in 50_finance/purchases/2026_04_03__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md with purchased_on=2026-04-03, total_eur=29, counterparty=Haushaltshilfe München. Confirming payment with the bank requires external system access not available in sandbox, so full request cannot be completed. Per inbox rule, do not mutate/delete inbox when blocked.
next_step.observation: The matched finance file confirms the requested bill details, but contains no bank-confirmation capability or paid-status verification via external bank.

function.message: تعذّر إكمال الطلب بالكامل: تم العثور على الفاتورة المطلوبة (2026-04-03 بقيمة 29 يورو من Haushaltshilfe München)، لكن لا يمكنني تأكيد السداد مع البنك من داخل هذا الـsandbox.
function.rulebook_notes: Unsupported-capability discipline: tasks requiring external bank/payment confirmation must return OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED and must not use local workaround artifacts. Inbox lane rule: if blocked, stop without mutating workspace.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox explicitly asks to 'confirm with the bank it is paid' (00_inbox/189_next-task.md). The sandbox exposes only local filesystem tools and no bank/API integration. Therefore bank confirmation is unsupported, even though the bill itself is verified in 50_finance/purchases/2026_04_03__eur_000029__bill__repair_ledger_filter_order.md.
